name: bpmct
html: bpmct
css: .bpmct-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100%;background:#080808;gap:1%}.l{font-family:Arial Black,Impact,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,12vw,6rem);font-weight:900;color:#39ff14;text-shadow:0 0 6px #39ff14,0 0 18px #39ff14,0 0 40px #39ff14,0 0 80px #00ff00;animation:bb 0.55s infinite alternate cubic-bezier(.33,0,.66,1)}@keyframes bb{0%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1);text-shadow:0 0 6px #39ff14,0 0 18px #39ff14,0 0 40px #39ff14,0 0 80px #00ff00}100%{transform:translateY(-22%) scale(1.18);text-shadow:0 0 10px #39ff14,0 0 30px #39ff14,0 0 70px #39ff14,0 0 140px #00ff00,0 0 220px #00ff00}}
